# BrierStudios
> Creative studio at the intersection of anime aesthetics, cyberpunk neon, and Norse mythology.

## What is BrierStudios?
BrierStudios is a creative technology studio founded by Ainz (BrierAinz). We build tools, agents, and art inspired by the Yggdrasil framework — a Norse mythology-inspired architecture that organizes projects into Nine Realms.

## Flagship: Lilith v2.0
Lilith is our AI-powered artistic identity — an anime/cyberpunk neon goddess with big expressive eyes, dynamic flowing hair with magenta streaks, and circuit neon armor. She represents the studio's visual language across all products.

### Core Palette
- Cyan: #38bdf8 (primary accent)
- Magenta: #d946ef (secondary accent)
- Aurora: #7dd3fc (highlights)
- Abyss: #0f172a (background)
- Gold: #fbbf24 (tertiary)
- Pale: #e2e8f0 (text)
- Void: #060810 (deepest dark)
- Hel: #c026d3 (danger/error)

### There Are Nine Realms
| Realm | Domain | Purpose |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Asgard 🔱 | Core Technology | Foundation libraries, configs, scaffolding |
| Vanaheim 🤖 | AI Agents | Discord bots, Telegram agents, personality systems |
| Alfheim ✨ | UI Prototypes | Visual design systems, frontend experiments |
| Svartalfheim 📖 | Knowledge & Docs | Documentation, wikis, knowledge bases |
| Muspelheim 🔥 | Active Dev | Work-in-progress, experimental branches |
| Niflheim ❄️ | Resources & Assets | Static assets, models, datasets |
| Helheim 💀 | Archive | Deprecated code, graveyard of failed experiments |
| Jotunheim 🏔️ | Massive Projects | Large-scale, long-term undertakings |
| Midgard 🌍 | Personal Apps | End-user applications, utilities |

## Products

### Yggdrasil CLI v6.5
A command-line interface with 19 slash commands for managing projects across the Nine Realms. Features include project scaffolding, realm switching, agent management, deployment pipelines, and a command palette with icy-themed UI.

Key commands: /init, /status, /build, /test, /lint, /realms, /agent, /deploy, /theme, /runes

### BrierStudios Landing Site
Live at brierstudios.com — a dark-themed landing page showcasing the studio's identity, Lilith variants, project portfolio, and CLI demo. Built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, deployed on Cloudflare Pages.

### docs.brierstudios.com
Full documentation site built with Docusaurus v3. Covers CLI reference, Lilith v2.0 identity, architecture, AI agents, and LoRA training pipelines.

### LoRA Training Pipeline
Character model training using Z-Image Base and Kohya_ss. Active LoRA: Ehyra Z-Image (anime character style, 3000 steps).

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, Docusaurus v3 (docs)
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages
- Domain: brierstudios.com (Cloudflare registrar)
- AI: Custom LoRAs on Z-Image Base / PixAI DiT.2
- CLI: Node.js / Ink (React for CLI)
- Style: Cinzel (headings) + JetBrains Mono (code) + Inter (body)

## The Yggdrasil Rules (REGLAS_YGGDRASIL.md)
All projects follow a unified convention system defined in REGLAS_YGGDRASIL.md v3.1. This includes naming conventions, color palette, emoji markers per realm, and architectural patterns.
